name: Sonda (Duplicate with update)
message: Sonda, This is a Chilean multinational IT company headquartered in Santiago we hacked last month. But it's network is still vulnerable and we hacked into company again in 2023-05-04. There is proof image below. More than 4TB of data is published on telegram channel today. Everyone can access & download it's data. We recommend companies not to use Sonda IT support.
